games.headline: Baltimore 13, Toronto 3
games.summary: Adley Rutschman powered the Orioles offense with four hits, including a home run, and five RBIs as Baltimore cruised to a 13-3 victory over the Blue Jays. Brandon Young also pitched well, contributing to the dominant win.

games.headline: Texas 3, Cleveland 2 — Gray (W)
games.summary: Corey Seager's two-run homer provided the key blast for the Rangers, who held off a late push from the Guardians to win a nail-biter 3-2. T.Bazzana also homered for Cleveland, but Peyton Gray and Jacob Latz secured the narrow victory.

games.headline: St. Louis 10, Cincinnati 3
games.summary: Hunter Dobbins dominated on the mound, throwing five scoreless innings for the Cardinals. He was backed by a powerful offense, including A.Burleson's home run, as St. Louis routed the Reds 10-3.

games.headline: New York Blank San Diego, 5-0
games.summary: Christian Scott silenced the Padres' bats, pitching 5.2 scoreless innings in the Mets' 5-0 shutout victory. L. Torrens drove in two runs, including a homer, to support Scott's dominant performance at Petco Park.

games.headline: Philadelphia 8, Chicago 6 — Bowlan (W)
games.summary: An 8-6 slugfest saw the Phillies outlast the White Sox at Citizens Bank Park. K.Schwarber's four hits were key for Philadelphia's offense, securing the win for Jonathan Bowlan and a save for Jhoan Duran, despite R.Grichuk's two home runs for Chicago.

games.headline: Boston 5, New York 3 — Gray (W)
games.summary: Willson Contreras's three-run home run and Alex Monasterio's solo shot powered the Red Sox offense in a 5-3 victory over the Yankees. Sonny Gray pitched 6.1 innings for the win, with Aroldis Chapman earning the save.

games.headline: Minnesota 5, Kansas City 3 — Matthews (W)
games.summary: B. Lee's impactful two-run home run was a pivotal moment for the Twins, complementing Zebby Matthews' effective seven-inning start as Minnesota earned a 5-3 win against the Royals, secured by Travis Adams' save.

games.headline: Tampa Bay Blank Miami, 6-0
games.summary: Drew Rasmussen stifled the Marlins, striking out nine over seven scoreless innings as the Rays rolled to a 6-0 victory. R.Palacios and R.Vilade each contributed two RBIs to secure the shutout win.

games.headline: Los Angeles Blank Los Angeles, 1-0
games.summary: R. Sasaki stifled the Angels offense over seven scoreless innings with ten strikeouts. F. Freeman's solo home run for the game's only run lifted the Dodgers to a hard-fought 1-0 victory in a true pitcher's duel.

games.headline: Houston 5, Athletics 1 — Lambert (W)
games.summary: Isaac Paredes blasted a grand slam, driving in four runs that put the Astros ahead for good, as they defeated the Athletics 5-1. Peter Lambert earned the win, limiting the Athletics to one run over 5.1 innings.

games.headline: Detroit 7, Seattle 3 — Valdez (W)
games.summary: Bryan Woo struggled on the mound, giving up five earned runs to Detroit as the Tigers built an early lead against the Mariners. F. Valdez then locked down their offense, helping Detroit secure a 7-3 victory.

games.headline: Milwaukee 9, Colorado 7 (F/10)
games.summary: The game went back and forth, knotted for nine innings. J.Bauers finally broke the 7-7 deadlock in the tenth with an RBI single, helping the Brewers defeat the Rockies 9-7 in a tense extra-inning battle.

games.headline: San Francisco 18, Chicago 3
games.summary: Will Adames crushed two home runs and drove in four runs, while Casey Schmitt added two more homers, fueling the Giants' overwhelming 18-3 victory over the Cubs. Robbie Ray added five scoreless innings at Wrigley Field.

games.headline: Atlanta 6, Pittsburgh 3 — Pérez (W)
games.summary: Mitch Keller struggled on the mound, giving up six earned runs in just 4.2 innings, allowing the Braves to build an early lead. Martín Pérez earned the win as Atlanta beat the Pirates 6-3 at Truist Park.

games.headline: Washington 14, Arizona 1
games.summary: Washington's offense exploded for 14 runs, highlighted by L.Jr.'s two home runs and six RBIs, to crush the Diamondbacks 14-1. Foster Griffin earned the win as the Nationals secured a resounding blowout victory.
